overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in red armor exploring a dimly lit industrial warehouse facility. The character moves through storage rooms, narrow corridors, and a large chamber with metal staircases.

scene_state.functional_zone: small storage locker room with metal shelving

agents.ego_description: character stands near storage shelves then turns and walks toward the exit doorway

entered.detail: tall metal shelving unit with multiple levels containing boxes and yellow cloth
large green plastic storage bin on the floor
yellow fabric hanging from the shelving unit
metal door frame leading to the next area

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a small enclosed storage room with metal shelving units and green containers. The space is dimly lit with artificial lighting, and the character prepares to exit through the doorway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage room with cables and tables

events.description: character exits the small locker room into a larger storage area with cables on the floor

agents.ego_description: character walks through the doorway and proceeds across the room with scattered cables and boxes

entered.detail: stack of cardboard boxes on the floor near the wall
circular metal table with items on top
metal folding chairs near the table
thick black cables running across the metal floor plates
tall metal shelving with wrapped items and containers

segments.scene_description: The character enters a larger industrial room with metal flooring, scattered cardboard boxes, and cables running across the ground. A round metal table with chairs sits to the right as the character walks forward toward a narrow corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor between metal walls

events.description: character enters a narrow corridor between tall industrial walls and piping

agents.ego_description: character walks through the tight corridor with metal walls on both sides, approaching a staircase

entered.detail: tall corrugated metal walls forming the corridor sides
industrial light fixtures mounted on the walls
elevated metal walkway with railings on the right side
metal staircase visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow industrial corridor with metal walls and overhead catwalks. Wall-mounted lights illuminate the path as the character approaches a metal staircase at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: large industrial chamber with metal staircases

events.description: character exits the narrow corridor into a large open industrial chamber

agents.ego_description: character enters the large chamber and walks toward the metal stairs, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench against the right wall

entered.detail: elevated metal platform with railings above the main floor
large pipes running along the walls and ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a large industrial chamber with a prominent metal staircase now visible on the left leading to an upper platform. Another person sits against the right wall as the character explores the open space with visible piping and industrial structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped storage area through a series of industrial passages into a vast open chamber. It begins in a small, dimly lit room filled with metal shelving and green containers before the character exits through a doorway. As the space opens up, the camera moves across a larger industrial room cluttered with cardboard boxes and cables, passing a round metal table on the right. The scene then shifts into a narrow corridor defined by metal walls and overhead catwalks, following the path of wall-mounted lights toward a distant staircase. Finally, the camera emerges into a large industrial chamber where the metal staircase leads to an upper platform and another person sits against the wall amidst a network of piping and structures.
